TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sadu = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang sadu. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 366 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 348 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 18 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal10%, Bunun3%. Hangan alang Alang Sadu Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Sadu pa wa mniq Dwiyaq Kiray hwinuk dwiyaq tupryaxanhidaw, kiya ka qnlhangan Taiwan saya mntna Cyen-su-syang alang Cinsbu sunca ddha knbaraw bay nniqan alang. Nniqan niya Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Truku cwen. Knlbangan Hay-pa 1,800 meyta. Nniqan lnglingay Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu niya‚ÄĒ Kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw Kwo-taw 3 Fomosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚Üí Kwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíHori, muru elu Tay 14 seyng (Pu-U kong-ru) mquri paran mmusa dhuq alang Bwarung, lmutuc elu uusa alang Truku To 85 seyng, muru mkngahu Yayung Tudu hmrin Cing-ing-cwen ya bay 12 km daw kiya ka dhuq Truku cwen da. Tapa rulu niya: Kndadax tudaya mi tuhunac mpriwaw na pa tapa rulu dhuq ppanan rulu Taycyu Kan-cng, uxay daw msdurux tapa rulu dhuq Nan-to Hori u malu uri, kiya mi tapa rulu dhuq Hori daw tapa rulu snpeyyah Hori-Truku seyng na Nan-to k-yun, mrbu 6:30 snpeyyah alang tapa rulu dhuq Hori, babaw cka hidaw 15:30 ka kndadax Hori mbrunah musa alang Truku, mntxal ka kingal diyax ppanan rulu, diyax ppanan rulu u ya bay 2 jikang. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq tnualang Sejiq Truku. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Sejiq Truku. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Cyoro Kyokay, Teynskyo (Wana bay kingal mslutuc da). Pnyahan alang Pusu pnyahan sediq alang Truku pa snpeyyah "Alang Brayaw" mi "Alang Truwan cbiyaw", kiya mi thdil dhuq "Alang Busi"mi "Alang Sadu"mi "Alang Truwan"saya. Tnualang saya u psnakan tudaya, tukcka mi tuhunac tuturu nniqan, sediq alangtudaya pa; kiya ka"Alang Brayaw"mi "Alang Busi"u babaw ndan Mccbu Kmciyuk Tanah Tunux daw ta bay wada thdil alang Bwarung da. Qntan patas Jin-ay go-ko-syo wang-can:šĽĀśĄõťĄČŚÖ¨śČÄÁ∂≤Áęô: nyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = sadu = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč sadu. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq**%, tajal**%, bunun*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč sadu tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč sadu pa wa mniq dwijaq ki…ĺaj ńßwinuk dwijaq tup…ĺjaxanńßidaw, kija ka qnlńßaŇčan taiwan saja mntna ¶j…ôn-su-sjaŇč alaŇč ¶insbu sun ¶a ddńßa knba…ĺaw baj nniqan alaŇč. nniqan nija nan-to-k…ôŇč …üin-aj-go t…ĺuku ¶w…ôn. knlbaŇčan ńßaj-pa *,*** m…ôta. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu nija* kwo-taw * ¶oŇč-san-kaw, uxaj daw kwo-taw * *omosa kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu* kwo-taw * sw…ô-sa-…ĺj…ôn kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*ńßo…ĺi, mu…ĺu …ôlu taj ** s…ôŇč (pu-u koŇč-…ĺu) mqu…ĺi pa…ĺan mmusa dńßuq alaŇč bwa…ĺuŇč, lmutu ¶ …ôlu uusa alaŇč t…ĺuku to ** s…ôŇč, mu…ĺu mkŇčańßu jajuŇč tudu ńßm…ĺin ¶iŇč-iŇč- ¶w…ôn ja baj ** km daw kija ka dńßuq t…ĺuku ¶w…ôn da. tapa …ĺulu nija: kndadax tudaja mi tuńßuna ¶ mp…ĺiwaw na pa tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ppanan …ĺulu taj ¶ju kan- ¶Ňč, uxaj daw msdu…ĺux tapa …ĺulu dńßuq nan-to ńßo…ĺi u malu u…ĺi, kija mi tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ńßo…ĺi daw tapa …ĺulu snp…ôjańß ńßo…ĺi-t…ĺuku s…ôŇč na nan-to k-jun, m…ĺbu *:** snp…ôjańß alaŇč tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ńßo…ĺi, babaw ¶ka ńßidaw **:** ka kndadax ńßo…ĺi mb…ĺunańß musa alaŇč t…ĺuku, mntxal ka kiŇčal dijax ppanan …ĺulu, dijax ppanan …ĺulu u ja baj * …üikaŇč. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq tnualaŇč s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, t…ônskjo (wana baj kiŇčal mslutu ¶ da). pnjańßan alaŇč pusu pnjańßan s…ôdiq alaŇč t…ĺuku pa snp…ôjańß "alaŇč b…ĺajaw" mi "alaŇč t…ĺuwan ¶bijaw", kija mi tńßdil dńßuq "alaŇč busi"mi "alaŇč sadu"mi "alaŇč t…ĺuwan"saja. tnualaŇč saja u psnakan tudaja, tuk ¶ka mi tuńßuna ¶ tutu…ĺu nniqan, s…ôdiq alaŇčtudaja pa; kija ka"alaŇč b…ĺajaw"mi "alaŇč busi"u babaw ndan m ¶ ¶bu km ¶ijuk tanańß tunux daw ta baj wada tńßdil alaŇč bwa…ĺuŇč da. qntan patas …üin-aj go-ko-sjo waŇč- ¶an:*******: njańßan pnatas
S.FORM: = Sadu = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang sadu. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 366 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 348 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 18 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal10%, Bunun3%. Hangan alang Alang Sadu Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Sadu pa wa mniq Dwiyaq Kiray hwinuk dwiyaq tupryaxanhidaw, kiya ka qnlhangan Taiwan saya mntna Cyen-su-syang alang Cinsbu sunca ddha knbaraw bay nniqan alang. Nniqan niya Nan-to-keyng Jin-ay-go Truku cwen. Knlbangan Hay-pa 1,800 meyta. Nniqan lnglingay Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu niya‚ÄĒ Kwo-taw 1 Cong-san-kaw, uxay daw Kwo-taw 3 Fomosa kaw-su-kong-ru‚Üí Kwo-taw 6 Swey-sa-ryeyn kaw-su-kong-ru‚ÜíHori, muru elu Tay 14 seyng (Pu-U kong-ru) mquri paran mmusa dhuq alang Bwarung, lmutuc elu uusa alang Truku To 85 seyng, muru mkngahu Yayung Tudu hmrin Cing-ing-cwen ya bay 12 km daw kiya ka dhuq Truku cwen da. Tapa rulu niya: Kndadax tudaya mi tuhunac mpriwaw na pa tapa rulu dhuq ppanan rulu Taycyu Kan-cng, uxay daw msdurux tapa rulu dhuq Nan-to Hori u malu uri, kiya mi tapa rulu dhuq Hori daw tapa rulu snpeyyah Hori-Truku seyng na Nan-to k-yun, mrbu 6:30 snpeyyah alang tapa rulu dhuq Hori, babaw cka hidaw 15:30 ka kndadax Hori mbrunah musa alang Truku, mntxal ka kingal diyax ppanan rulu, diyax ppanan rulu u ya bay 2 jikang. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyn-cu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq tnualang Sejiq Truku. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Sejiq Truku. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Cyoro Kyokay, Teynskyo (Wana bay kingal mslutuc da). Pnyahan alang Pusu pnyahan sediq alang Truku pa snpeyyah "Alang Brayaw" mi "Alang Truwan cbiyaw", kiya mi thdil dhuq "Alang Busi"mi "Alang Sadu"mi "Alang Truwan"saya. Tnualang saya u psnakan tudaya, tukcka mi tuhunac tuturu nniqan, sediq alangtudaya pa; kiya ka"Alang Brayaw"mi "Alang Busi"u babaw ndan Mccbu Kmciyuk Tanah Tunux daw ta bay wada thdil alang Bwarung da. uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq**%, tajal**%, bunun*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč sadu tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč sadu pa wa mniq dwijaq ki…ĺaj ńßwinuk dwijaq tup…ĺjaxanńßidaw, kija ka qnlńßaŇčan taiwan saja mntna ¶j…ôn-su-sjaŇč alaŇč ¶insbu sun ¶a ddńßa knba…ĺaw baj nniqan alaŇč. nniqan nija nan-to-k…ôŇč …üin-aj-go t…ĺuku ¶w…ôn. knlbaŇčan ńßaj-pa *,*** m…ôta. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu nija* kwo-taw * ¶oŇč-san-kaw, uxaj daw kwo-taw * *omosa kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu* kwo-taw * sw…ô-sa-…ĺj…ôn kaw-su-koŇč-…ĺu*ńßo…ĺi, mu…ĺu …ôlu taj ** s…ôŇč (pu-u koŇč-…ĺu) mqu…ĺi pa…ĺan mmusa dńßuq alaŇč bwa…ĺuŇč, lmutu ¶ …ôlu uusa alaŇč t…ĺuku to ** s…ôŇč, mu…ĺu mkŇčańßu jajuŇč tudu ńßm…ĺin ¶iŇč-iŇč- ¶w…ôn ja baj ** km daw kija ka dńßuq t…ĺuku ¶w…ôn da. tapa …ĺulu nija: kndadax tudaja mi tuńßuna ¶ mp…ĺiwaw na pa tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ppanan …ĺulu taj ¶ju kan- ¶Ňč, uxaj daw msdu…ĺux tapa …ĺulu dńßuq nan-to ńßo…ĺi u malu u…ĺi, kija mi tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ńßo…ĺi daw tapa …ĺulu snp…ôjańß ńßo…ĺi-t…ĺuku s…ôŇč na nan-to k-jun, m…ĺbu *:** snp…ôjańß alaŇč tapa …ĺulu dńßuq ńßo…ĺi, babaw ¶ka ńßidaw **:** ka kndadax ńßo…ĺi mb…ĺunańß musa alaŇč t…ĺuku, mntxal ka kiŇčal dijax ppanan …ĺulu, dijax ppanan …ĺulu u ja baj * …üikaŇč. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn- ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq tnualaŇč s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ô…üiq t…ĺuku. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, t…ônskjo (wana baj kiŇčal mslutu ¶ da). pnjańßan alaŇč pusu pnjańßan s…ôdiq alaŇč t…ĺuku pa snp…ôjańß "alaŇč b…ĺajaw" mi "alaŇč t…ĺuwan ¶bijaw", kija mi tńßdil dńßuq "alaŇč busi"mi "alaŇč sadu"mi "alaŇč t…ĺuwan"saja. tnualaŇč saja u psnakan tudaja, tuk ¶ka mi tuńßuna ¶ tutu…ĺu nniqan, s…ôdiq alaŇčtudaja pa; kija ka"alaŇč b…ĺajaw"mi "alaŇč busi"u babaw ndan m ¶ ¶bu km ¶ijuk tanańß tunux daw ta baj wada tńßdil alaŇč bwa…ĺuŇč da. qntan patas …üin-aj go-ko-sjo waŇč- ¶an:*******: njańßan pnatas
